name: Cinnamon Walnut Scones
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Taste Of Home - February/March 1997
In a bowl, combine the first six ingredients; cut in butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Combine eggs and cream; stir into dry ingredients just until moistened. Turn onto a floured surface; gently pat into a 7-inch circle, 3/4-inch thick. Cut into eight wedges.
Separate wedges; place on a lightly greased baking sheet. Brush tops with buttermilk. Let rest 15 minutes. Bake at 450°F for 14-16 minutes or until golden brown.
